title: Pacific Coast Recreational Fisheries Information Network Data Warehouse

access.reason: The RecFIN warehouse is interactive and query-specific; reproducibility requires retaining the exported file and query parameters rather than assuming a stable download URL.
instructions: Export the selected California sample or estimate table from the official data warehouse.
Save query parameters and the export timestamp alongside the raw file.
Preserve state, survey, mode, area, species, time, effort, expansion, and precision fields.
Only rows with legitimately released point coordinates may enter point-level terrain models.
access.ingestion_command: python -m pipeline.contourcast.cli ingest-observations --input RECFIN_EXPORT.csv --output DATA/recfin.csv --source-id psmfc_recfin --column-map column_map.json --expected-sha256 SHA256

coverage: Recreational sample data and estimates for Washington, Oregon, and California; product-specific years vary.
citation: Pacific States Marine Fisheries Commission, Recreational Fisheries Information Network. Cite the contributing survey, query, and access date.
limitations: Data from different state/federal surveys may use different designs and are not automatically comparable.
Expanded estimates require survey-design-aware uncertainty handling.
Public location granularity may be coarser than bathymetry pixels.
Absence of an observed catch is not proof that a species was absent from a location.
